title: Employee Rights — NLRB
description: NLRB page summarizing Section 7 rights under the NLRA: to form, join, or assist a union; to engage in concerted activity for mutual aid or protection (with or without a union); and to refrain from such activity. Identifies workers excluded from NLRA coverage (government employees, agricultural and domestic workers, supervisors, independent contractors, and others).
notes: DDS context: state/local government employees (incl. MassAbility/DDS staff) are explicitly EXCLUDED from NLRA coverage; their bargaining rights are governed by M.G.L. c.150E and enforced by the DLR, not the NLRB.
